problem id: 1249ddb4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01000101 -> 00011100
  00101011 -> 10101001
  00101111 -> 10111001
  11011010 -> 01110011
  11010111 -> 01000110
  11011000 -> 01111011
  11100011 -> 10010000
  10100101 -> 10000000
  01000110 -> 00010000

query: 01101001
predicted answer: 10101001
